scripts.format: prettier --write package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml prettier.config.mjs tsconfig.json "apps/{admin,website}/**/*.{ts,tsx,css,json,mjs,md}" "packages/{config,types,ui,utils}/**/*.{ts,tsx,css,json,mjs,md}" README.md docs/architecture/frontend-architecture.md docs/development/setup.md docs/development/coding-standards.md docs/performance/performance-checklist.md
